description: Private constant `SkillGoodFloor = 7` is defined but never referenced anywhere in the file or codebase. The switch expression in `GetSkillColorClass` uses `<= SkillGoodCeiling` (line 41) to cover the good-skill range, making this constant dead code.
suggestedFix: Remove the unused constant: `private const int SkillGoodFloor = 7;`

description: Private constant `SkillOutstandingFloor = 11` is defined but never referenced anywhere in the file or codebase. The switch expression in `GetSkillColorClass` uses the `_` discard arm (line 43) to handle the outstanding-skill case, making this constant dead code.
suggestedFix: Remove the unused constant: `private const int SkillOutstandingFloor = 11;`
